title: auricula-ursi hirsuta
intro: Auricula-ursi hirsuta, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include astringent and antiseptic properties due to the presence of arbutin, a compound that inhibits the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of auricula-ursi hirsuta include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of auricula-ursi hirsuta include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
